Incident Report: Cybersecurity and MNPI Exposure — Yunhe Data Systems Co., Ltd. (USCC: 9136YJ00MA8K2L1Q3X), Linghai City, Yunjiang Province
Report ID YDS-IR-2026-061, detected 2026-06-03 21:42 CST, reported 2026-06-04 09:15 CST
A data loss prevention alert flagged unauthorized copying of pre-disclosure financial materials belonging to issuer applicant Luhai Smart Components Co., Ltd. (client USCC: 9240YJ88MA1R9B2F7Q) scheduled for review by the Lingnan Securities Exchange (LNX) Issuer Supervision Office
Mr. Pan Yichen (DOB 1991-08-23, age 34), Senior Data Engineer, Yunhe Data Systems (Linghai R&D Center, Zone C, Level 9), signed in as pan_yc; email yichen.pan@yunhe-ds.example.cn; internal ext. 6623
His masked resident ID 42************381X and payroll unit YDS-ENG-04 were present in the same audit artifacts alongside device asset LH-NB-0421 (MAC 4E:19:AA:02:3C:77) and VPN session S-LH-7F49A1
Logs show Mr. Pan’s account accessed \\files.linghai.yds\issuer\Luhai\2026H1_draft\pre_earnings.xlsx and attempted to sync to an offshore backup endpoint "yunhe-dr-nanhua" at 22:03 via client agent v3.9.4
The network path indicates the DR target is hosted in Nanhu Special Administrative Region, invoking cross-border transfer rules under PIPL, CSL, and DSL, and the security assessment filing requirements of the Cyberspace and Data Administration of Linghai
Preliminary review suggests MNPI was viewed and copied before public disclosure; no onshore posting occurred, and no financial transactions by Yunhe personnel have been detected
Root cause: employment offboarding workflow failure for an internal transfer—Mr. Pan moved from Issuer Services to Core Platform on 2026-05-20 but retained legacy read access; privileged access review ticket YDS-IAM-4472 remained pending
Non-named weak identifiers elsewhere in the same share include a profile “born 1987-02, QA role, East Park office, device CT-TAB-11, Android 12, account qa_ops_02,” which by itself does not identify a specific natural person
Additional generic demographics in training materials (“female, 30s, north district, shift B”) are non-identifying and not treated as PI under PIPL absent linkage
No bank card numbers, precise home addresses, health data, or minors’ data (<14) were involved in this incident; face images in access logs are blurred and stored locally
Containment actions: account pan_yc suspended 2026-06-04 09:20; device LH-NB-0421 isolated; shared folder permissions on \\files.linghai.yds\issuer narrowed; DR sync job to "yunhe-dr-nanhua" paused and subject to LCDA security assessment filing
Notifications: issuer client Luhai Smart Components informed 2026-06-04 10:00; internal report filed to Linghai Financial Markets Service Center and LCDA; consultation requested with Lingnan Securities Exchange compliance liaison regarding potential selective disclosure
For queries contact Data Protection Office at dpo@yunhe-ds.example.cn; do not include MNPI or personal identifiers in the email subject
